system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet_xuattandung","body":"
CREATE   PROC [dbo].[DQT_PALLET_CHITIET_XUATTANDUNG](@tungay date, @denngay date)
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT A.bennhan, C.donhang, C.id_nguyenlieu, B.nguyenlieu, B.dayy, B.rong, B.dai, B.soluong, B.sokhoi, C.machatluong, C.phanloai
	INTO #PHIEUXUAT
	FROM dqt_xuat_pallet A
		INNER JOIN dqt_xuat_pallet_chitiet B ON A.id = B.id_xuat
		INNER JOIN dqt_pallet_chitiet C ON B.id_chitiet = C.id
	WHERE A.ngayxuat BETWEEN @tungay AND @denngay AND A.active = 1

	SELECT A.madonhang, A.malo_nguyenlieu, C.nguongoc, D.fsc_name
	INTO #PHOI_DAUVAO
	FROM dqt_thongke_phoi A
		LEFT JOIN tr_nguongoc C ON A.xuatxu = C.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc D ON A.fsc_id = D.fsc_id
	WHERE A.madonhang IN (SELECT donhang FROM #PHIEUXUAT) AND LEN(A.madonhang) > 0

	-- MÃ LÔ NGUYÊN LIỆU
	SELECT madonhang, malo_nguyenlieu = STRING_AGG(malo_nguyenlieu, ', ')
	INTO #DONHANG_MALO
	FROM (
		SELECT madonhang, malo_nguyenlieu FROM #PHOI_DAUVAO GROUP BY madonhang, malo_nguyenlieu
	) A GROUP BY madonhang

	-- NGUỒN GỐC
	SELECT madonhang, nguongoc = STRING_AGG(nguongoc, ', ')
	INTO #DONHANG_NGUONGOC
	FROM (
		SELECT madonhang, nguongoc FROM #PHOI_DAUVAO GROUP BY madonhang, nguongoc
	) A GROUP BY madonhang

	-- TÌNH TRẠNG FSC
	SELECT madonhang, fsc_name = STRING_AGG(fsc_name, ', ')
	INTO #DONHANG_FSC
	FROM (
		SELECT madonhang, fsc_name FROM #PHOI_DAUVAO GROUP BY madonhang, fsc_name
	) A GROUP BY madonhang

	SELECT A.donhang, A.machatluong, 
		A.nguyenlieu, A.nguongoc, A.fsc_name, A.malo_nguyenlieu, 
		A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai, 
		SUM(A.soluong) AS soluong,
		SUM(A.sokhoi) AS sokhoi
	FROM (
		SELECT A.bennhan, A.donhang, A.machatluong, 
			A.nguyenlieu, A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai, A.soluong, A.sokhoi,
			B.malo_nguyenlieu, C.nguongoc, D.fsc_name
		FROM #PHIEUXUAT A
			LEFT JOIN #DONHANG_MALO B ON A.donhang = B.madonhang
			LEFT JOIN #DONHANG_NGUONGOC C ON A.donhang = C.madonhang
			LEFT JOIN #DONHANG_FSC D ON A.donhang = D.madonhang
	) A
	GROUP BY A.donhang, A.machatluong, A.nguyenlieu, A.nguongoc, A.fsc_name, A.malo_nguyenlieu, A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai

	DROP TABLE #PHIEUXUAT, #PHOI_DAUVAO;
	DROP TABLE #DONHANG_FSC, #DONHANG_NGUONGOC, #DONHANG_MALO;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.dqt_xuat_pallet","dbo.dqt_xuat_pallet_chitiet","dbo.tr_nguongoc","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
